texto: Each day Marda gets closer. The sub circles coral reefs off the coasts, where mermaids are said to like the colors of the schools of fishes, and train them to swim around their necks like jewelry or live behind their ears, beneath their long hair. Sometimes mermaids like shallow places, but mostly they like the dark and the beautiful, uncharted, abandoned, soulless parts of the undiscovered world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Holly Walrath: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Each day Marda gets closer. The sub circles coral reefs off the coasts, where mermaids are said t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, fantasy, fantasy-fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e reflexao-noturna.
